violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. A bag of chicken was in the back glass cooler in the back room was dated 4/10. A bag of prepped lettuce in the same cooler was dated 4/25. These items were not discarded after the 10 days allowed.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The handle on the left door of the reach in cooler in the kitchen is broken.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The black curtain on the ice machine in the hopper needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The white storage drawers under the prep sink in the kitchen need to be cleaned.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. The white and salad plates on the bottom shelf of the stainless steel counter in the kitchen were not inverted, or covered.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
